    Serialized Form

        class LowHIndexException extends Exception implements Serializable

    • Package models

      • Class models.Admin

        class Admin extends Employee implements Serializable

      • Class models.Complaint

        class Complaint extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

          • createdAt
            LocalDateTime createdAt
          • description
            String description
          • recipient
            Employee recipient
          • resolved
            boolean resolved
          • sender
            Employee sender
          • subject
            String subject
